title: Boostic
body:
![boost fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46e61bcbdc421b7ebfdc4d3299572478ea9947ab.png)
# 📑 Description:
Just optimization, nothing extra
 
# ✨ Recommendation:
If you have Nvidia 16 series and above, I recommend adding **[Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)** mod.

For weak computers, I recommend choosing **Vulcan**. It does not support shaders and most mods, but shows good results
# 📥 Installation:

<details>
<summary>Prism Launcher</summary>
  
1. Click Add Instance
  
2. Select Modrinth tab from the left
  
3. Enter in search "Boostic"
  
4. Select our modpack
  
5. Click OK
  
6. The modpack will now install.
 
7. Once installed, double-click the icon to play.

</details>

<details>
<summary>For Modrint app</summary>
  
1. Enter in search "Boostic"

2. Click Install

3.  The modpack will now install.

4.  Once installed, hover on the created instance under "Jump back in"

5.  Click ▶️ button to play.
   
     [Also, there is official documentation](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth)


</details>

<details>
<summary>Other launchers</summary>
  
- For other launchers that do not support mrpack, use the [mrpack converter](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/)
